subcodes.first_line: O King of creation and Ruler over all lands! I beseech Thee by the Name through which was raised the shrill voice of Thy Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سلطان الایجاد و الحاکم علی البلاد اسئلک بالاسم الذی به ارتفع صریر قلمک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
